response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong leadership skills and deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and system architecture. However, he falls significantly short of the requirement for 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. He lacks essential exposure to Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, making him unsuitable for this highly specialized GenAI role despite his recent work with MCP and agentic workflows.
strengths: Extensive staff-level engineering experience with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud deployments (AWS).
Recent, highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflows.
Proven technical leadership, open-source contribution, and mentoring capabilities demonstrated through founding platforms and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict requirement of 8+ years of experience specifically building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
AI experience appears limited to a very recent role, missing the required deep expertise in LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques.
